candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conv=100% SHORT but green_matches=0, only trade the pair whose hist_hr exceeds 65% — the others are conviction without historical confirmation.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 1.0 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.65: veto_trade()  # require historical hit-rate confirmation when no green matches exist
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
